titleStmt.title: SII 23.14: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 14. (A.R. No. 14 of 1907.) Tiruviśalūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Thanjavur District Śivayōganātha temple—on the same wall Kulōttuṅga III: year 18: 1194-95 A.D.

summary.p: This belongs to the eighteenth regnal year of king Parakēsarivarman alias Tribhuvanachakravartin Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷadēva (III) “who was pleased to take Madurai and the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya”. The introduction commences with the words Puyal vāyppa etc. The details of the date given viz. Kumbha, śu. 3, Saturday, Pūram are however irregular. This registers a sale of 2 mā and odd of land by two brothers by name Vaṅgippuṟattu Tiruviśalūraḍigaḷ-Bhaṭṭa and Aṇḍanāyaka-Bhaṭṭa of Ediriliśōḻa-chaturvēdimangalam in Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu to a certain Kuṉikkumpirāṉ Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-Uḍaiyāṉ of Neḍuñjērikkuḍi in Puliyūr-nāḍu a division of Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu for 280 kāśu. This land was then donated to the temple by the latter for the maintenance of a twilight lamp, with the produce there of after paying the uḷnilavari on the land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī .. puyalvāyppa vaḷamperukap poyyāta nāṉ
maṟaiyiṉ ceyal vāyppa tirumakaḷuñ jayamakaḷuñ ciṟan
tu vāḻa veṇmatipol kuṭai viḷaṅka velventa raṭivaṇaṅ
ka ḷaṅ kaḷippa ma ceṅ
kolu ṉattuñ cela pacai
ntu ca tu vāṉaveṅkaiyum maṭamāṉum vantoru ṟa niruṇ
ṇa koḷ veṅkaik koṭip pāyttu koṟṟavātaṅ koṭi maṉiya
cuṅkamillāc coṇāṭeṅkum coṟṟumalai kaṇṭaruḷi teṉṉavaṉ ta
nataṭi paṇiya teṉṉilaṅ koḷkaveṉṉa tiraikkaṭalai Aṭaikka
veṉṉa maṉṉu tiruvāṟ paṭaiyāl malaikoṇṭu vaḻipaṭutti Ilaṅ
kaiyarkoṉ talai Arinta tiruneṭumāliva neṉṉa taka miku taṉu
vatiṉāl Araṇ Uṭaippaṭai viḻutta ceṅkolum pulikkoṭiyum ta
ṭuñceṟu naṭātti Aṅku neṟi Aṭai ṭi taram kāt
ṉai tiruṉāṉkaiyum ja ytu koṭi pāṅki Okkavar
tirai Iṭuvār Oru toḻil naṭāttic cempoṟ viraphi
ṅkābaṉattu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya koppara
kecariparmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭi
yan muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷi[na śrī] kulōttuṅkacoḻa
tevarkku yāṇṭu patiṉeṭṭāvatu kumbhanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu
tritiyaiyum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūrattunāḷ Uṭaiyār Irāja
rājiśvaramuṭaiyār tevatāṉam virutarācapayaṅkaravaḷanāṭṭu
maṇṇināṭṭu vempaṟṟūrāṉa Etirilicoḻac caruppetimaṅkala
ttu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaicceri vaṅkipuṟattu tiruvicalūraṭikaḷ paṭ
ṭaṉum Eṉ tampi Aṇṭaṉāyaka paṭṭaṉum Ivviruvom nilavi
laippiramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu puli
yūrnāṭṭu neṭuñcerik kuṭaiyāṉ kuṉikkumpirāṉ tirucci
ṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉukku nāṅkaḷ Iṟṟaināḷāl viṟṟuk kuṭut
ta kāveri Uṭkuṟaip puñcey nilamāvatu Ivvūr Eṭṭāṅ kaṭ
ṭaḷaik kuṟaiyil Eṅkaḷ tamappaṉār Apāvattu Eṅkaḷ
tāy I tan raṇṭumāc ciṉṉam Innilam Iraṇṭumācci
ṉṉattukkum kiḻpāṟkellai Irācentiracoḻaṉ vāyttalai A
ṭi maṟuvāy Ellaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai perāṟṟukku vaṭa
kkum melpā Uṭaiyār tiruvicalūruṭaiyār tevatāṉattukku
k kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ Ivvāyttalaikku nirpāykiṟa ciṟṟāṟṟukku teṟkum
Āka Ivicainta peru nāṉkellaiyuṉ naṭuvupaṭṭa pāya varukiṟa U
ḷarpaṭi puñcainilam Iraṇṭumāc ciṉṉamum Itanāl vanta pākāciriyaṅ kaḷum Itaṉā
l tiruvulakaḷantaruḷivanta mikai nilamum Innilattu menokkiṉa maramum kiṇokkiṉa kiṇa
ṟum maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭa Urimaikaḷumakappaṭa viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷva tāṉa Emmi li
cainta vilaipporu ḷaṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 2 100 8 10 Ikkācu Irunūṟṟeṇ patum Āvaṇakkaḷiye
kāṭṭeṟṟi kaiccelavaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇa Icaivut tiṭṭuk kuṭuttom I
n neṭuñcerikkuṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉukku Ivaṅkippuṟattu tiruvicalūra
ṭikaḷpaṭṭaṉum En tampi Aṇṭanāyakapaṭṭaṉum Ivviruvom Iṉṉilat tukku Ituve vilai
yāvatākavum Ituve poruḷmāvaṟutip poruḷ cilavolaiyāvatāka vum Ituvallatu ve
ṟu poruḷmāvaṟuti poruḷc cilavolai kāṭṭak kaṭavatallātatāka vum Ippaṭikku
Ivan veṇṭiṉapote piramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭukka kaṭavomākavum māṭ ṭittilomāki
l Ivvicaivu tiṭṭe piramāṇamāvatākavum Ippaṭi Icaiṉtu vilaikkuṟa viṟṟu po
ruḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytu kuṭuttom Iṉ neṭuñ cerikkuṭaiyā
ṉ kuṉikkumpirāṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉukku vaṅkipuṟattu tiru vicalūraṭikaḷ paṭṭaṉu
m Eṉ tampi Aṇṭaṉāyakapaṭṭaṉum Ivviruvom Ivarkaḷ Artthikka Iṉṉila vilaippiramāṇa I
caivutiṭṭu Eḻutiṉeṉ Ācūri cirinārasiṅhabhaṭṭaneṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Iṉṉilam Iraṇṭu mā
cciṉṉattil Eṉṉopāti kācu nūṟṟunāṟpatuṅ kaikkoṇṭeṉ Iv vaṅkippuṟattu Aṇṭanāyakapaṭṭa
neṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Innilam Iraṇṭu māvil Eṉṉopāti viṟṟuk kuṭuttu Eṉṉopāti kācu nūṟṟunāṟ
patum kaikkoṇṭeṉ vaṅkippuṟattu tiruvicalūraṭikaḷ paṭṭaṉeṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippa
ṭi Aṟiveṉ velveṭṭi mātevapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ velveṭṭi tiruviṭai marutuṭai
yāṉpaṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ vaṅkippuṟattup piccatevapaṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kala
cciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kirāñci capāpati paṭṭaneṉ ..iṉṉilam civanāmattukkā
ṇiyāy Uḷ nilavari Iṟukkumpaṭi Iṟuttu mikutiyuḷḷutu cantiviḷakkuk kuṭalāka neṭuñcerikkuṭaiyā
ṉ kuṉikkumpirāṉ tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyāṉ koṇṭu viṭṭatu Itu paṉmāheśvarara kṣai .
Digital edition of SII 23.14 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
